title: Rocketed
description: Shoot your games performance to the moon!
body:
![rocketed main title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76dc9c6394acca243aa091981272276e93b84c4e.png)
## 🚀 Rocketed

**Rocketed** is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack built around one simple idea:
*Minecraft should run well at default settings.*

Instead of shipping the game with everything turned down to the lowest possible values, Rocketed focuses on **real optimisations**. The goal is to make the game run so smoothly that you don’t need to immediately open the settings menu just to get playable FPS.

This modpack is carefully put together to balance **visual quality and performance**, giving you a smooth and enjoyable experience without making the game look bad. You shouldn’t have to compromise just to get good frames.

![why us?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82853064e6cfa9b0d29d71a226e4abb1d10a9a6.png)
### What makes Rocketed different?
A lot of performance modpacks follow the same formula: lower all settings, add Sodium, and call it a day. Rocketed goes further than that.

* Optimisations that improve how Minecraft actually runs, not just how it’s configured
* Default settings that are already tuned for performance
* Smooth and consistent FPS in normal gameplay
* Designed to feel good to play, not stripped down

Rocketed doesn’t just reduce load — it improves efficiency.

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f3a6b53dba4cd6b9062bce492bc0e7acdf5ae53.png)
### Included features

Rocketed still comes with the features most players expect:

* Connected textures for a cleaner look
* Shader support (optional and performance-aware)
* Essentials included by default for multiplayer and quality-of-life features
* Strong compatibility if you want to add more mods later

![faq](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/558a145ed6eef5e6fba5995340e4d48524f3bf3c.png)
### FAQ 

<details>
<summary>Will version X be released?</summary>

If enough people request it (contact me on Discord: **@catcoll456**), I’ll update the pack.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Feature X is missing from version Y?</summary>

Some mods simply aren’t available for every Minecraft version. As soon as they are, you can expect an update to the pack.

</details>

<details>
<summary>The latest Minecraft version isn’t supported yet</summary>

Updates are released regularly, but not instantly. Please be patient while I work on bringing Rocketed to newer versions.

</details>
 

Rocketed is about making Minecraft run **better**, not just look worse.
Install it, launch it, and play.
